title: Vibrant Irish Lemongrass Skewers
description: Citrusy, crispy plant‑based skewers grilled on a yakimono, featuring lemongrass stalks and a smoky Irish herb blend.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium‑high heat.
Press the tofu for 30 minutes, then cut it into 1‑inch cubes.
Whisk together olive oil, soy sauce, agave syrup, lemon juice, smoked paprika, rosemary, sea salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Toss the tofu cubes in the bowl until evenly coated, then refrigerate for 15 minutes to marinate.
Soak the lemongrass stalk halves in warm water for 5 minutes to soften.
Thread the marinaded tofu cubes onto the lemongrass stalks, spacing them evenly and securing with kitchen twine if needed.
Grill the skewers for 8–10 minutes, turning every 2–3 minutes, until the tofu edges are golden and the lemongrass is crisp.
Remove from the grill, sprinkle with fresh parsley, and serve immediately.
